COMMENT: 
This variable has been retired; therefore, the field is blank starting with the 2023 Release 1 RIF. 
This data element is expected to capture data from HIPAA 837I claim loop 2400 SV202 or UB-04 FL 44 
only if the value represents a HCPCS/CPT.
